taxonomy: Diphyes arachnoidea is a species of comb jelly, belonging to the phylum Ctenophora. Ctenophora is a phylum of marine animals that are characterized by their use of cilia to capture food. Diphyes arachnoidea is further classified within the class Tunicata and the order Sicyophora. The order Sicyophora is a group of comb jellies that are characterized by their unique body shape and cilia structure. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Diphyes arachnoidea within the broader group of marine animals.
